//: Compiles ONLY the channel-worker graph (src/lib/channel/worker.ts and its imports) to CommonJS in dist/worker/, so PM2 can run it as a plain Node process outside Next.js. The `@/*` specifiers survive compilation; scripts/channel-worker.cjs maps them at require time. Nothing in this graph may import next/*, react or server actions — tsc fails here if one sneaks in.
